title: Let there be Create, Magic and Dinos
description: Create, Magic and Fossils and Archeology: Revival combined to the perfect modpack for a friend group
body:
Are you tired of the ordinary minecraft? Then this modpack is all for u. It is about create, magic and fossils and archeology. 

With a high focus on Create and fossils and archeology, for magic there is the Ars Nouveau mod

Combining these mods, we have tried to make a simple modpack for everyone in your friend group.
